info.name: BinDist Customer API
info.description:
Customer API collection for BinDist application distribution platform.

This collection covers the endpoints available to regular customers for browsing applications, versions, and downloading files.

## Authentication

All endpoints require an API key provided by your administrator.

**Header format:** `Authorization: Bearer {{api_key}}`

## Variables

- `base_url`: Your API endpoint (e.g., `https://api.bindist.eu`)
- `api_key`: Your customer API key
- `application_id`: Application ID for requests
- `version`: Version string (e.g., `1.0.0`)

item.name: Applications
item.description: Endpoints for listing and viewing applications

request.description:
Returns a list of applications you have access to.

Results are paginated. Use `page` and `limit` parameters to navigate.
Returns details for a specific application including metadata and latest version info.

header.description: Set to 'Test' to include disabled versions

query.description: Search term to filter versions by release notes (case-insensitive)

request.description:
Returns all versions for an application.

**Query Parameters:**
- `changelog`: Search term to filter versions by release notes content (case-insensitive)

**X-Channel header:**
- `Test`: Include disabled versions (for testing)
- Other/missing: Only enabled versions (production)

Returns all files in a specific version.

**File types:**
- `MAIN`: Primary executable/installer
- `DEPENDENCY`: Required libraries
- `DOCUMENTATION`: Docs, readmes
- `CONFIGURATION`: Config files

header.description: Set to 'Test' to download disabled versions

query.description: Specific file ID (optional, defaults to MAIN file)

request.description:
Generates a pre-signed download URL.

**URL validity:** 30 minutes

The response includes:
- `url`: Pre-signed download URL
- `fileName`: Original filename
- `fileSize`: Size in bytes
- `checksum`: SHA-256 checksum

**Note:** If the version is disabled and `X-Channel: Test` is not set, returns HTTP 403.

Creates a publicly accessible download link.

The generated link:
- Requires no authentication
- Can be shared with anyone
- Expires after the specified time (default: 30 minutes, max: 1440 minutes)

**Fields:**
- `applicationId`: Application ID (required)
- `version`: Version string (required)
- `fileId`: Specific file ID (optional, for multi-file versions)
- `expiresInMinutes`: Link expiry time in minutes (optional, 5-1440, default: 30)

variable.description: Share token from Create Share Link response

request.description:
Download a file using a share link token.

**No authentication required.**

This endpoint redirects (302) to a pre-signed S3 URL. Most HTTP clients will follow the redirect automatically.
